steps.expression: async () => { const agentsToDelete = []; let page = 1; let hasMore = true; while (hasMore && page <= 10) { const result = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: '', tagFilter: '', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page }); if (!result.ok) break; agentsToDelete.push(...result.value.items); hasMore = result.value.hasMore; page++; } for (const agent of agentsToDelete) { await window.api.agents.delete({ id: agent.id }); } return `Deleted ${agentsToDelete.length} agents`; }
